title: Create: Shuffle Filter
description: This mod provides a new "Shuffle Filter" item which, when used in Create deployers on contrabtions, enables a randomnes when placing blocks. (Like the shuffle mod for players).
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6addfe9f66010b7b44ff8f94b04f113fa3797e1d_0.webp)

# Create: Shuffle Filter
Add unpredictable variety to your automated builds.

The **Create Shuffle Filter** is a lightweight mod that adds a new *Shuffle Filter* item.  
When used in Create deployers on contraptions, it enables randomness when placing blocks (similar to the Shuffle Mod for players).

## Update 2.0 (beta) now available
Shuffle Filters now work on Rollers tooo.
Due to a architecture change its not backwards compatible. Old filters will be unconfigured new filters and need to be setup again.


## Why you'll love it
- **Randomness where you want it**: Choose between equal chance or weighted selection.  
- **Hands-free block variety**: No more manual block mixups — let your contraption handle it.  
- **Small and focused**: One item, one lightweight mixin — no heavy UI or config needed.  
- **Compatible**: Fully works with Create mod and its addons.  


## Quick Features
- **New item**: *Shuffle Filter* (`createshufflefilter:shuffle_filter`)  
- **Shuffle mode** for Create deployers on contraptions  
- Works as a **normal list filter** everywhere else  
- **Two selection modes**: Equal or Weighted
